_comment: Synthetic Microsoft 365 activity data for the KaizenIQ demo. Simulates the organizational signals that Work IQ would surface in production (Teams, Outlook, Planner, SharePoint). All names, emails and patterns are fictional.

notable_patterns: Recurring thread every Monday: manual consolidation of weekly quotes into Excel before pricing approval
Frequent question pattern (3-4x/week): 'where is the latest pricing table?' — suggests document findability issue
Escalation messages to CFO for pricing approval show average 2.1 day wait
Daily 7:30am thread: supervisors manually report line status, copied by planner into schedule spreadsheet
Rescheduling discussions average 14 messages and 3 participants per event
Material shortage alerts arrive via chat instead of system notification
CAPA deadline reminders posted manually by QM every Friday
Root cause analysis sessions scheduled via chat ping-pong, average 9 messages to find common slot
Recurring confusion about which form version to use (FRM-QA-001 v4 vs v5)
Complaint triage happens in chat before registration — average 4.5h delay before formal logging
Status requests from sales about open complaints: ~11 per week, each answered manually
Calibration due-date questions answered by supervisor from memory or personal spreadsheet
Photos of equipment labels shared in chat as informal calibration evidence

meetings_flagged_could_be_async.title: Weekly quote status review
meetings_flagged_could_be_async.reason: Status reading only, no decisions in last 6 occurrences

meetings_flagged_could_be_async.title: Daily line status standup
meetings_flagged_could_be_async.reason: Data could come from system dashboard

meetings_flagged_could_be_async.title: Monthly document control sync
meetings_flagged_could_be_async.reason: Agenda is reading the overdue document list aloud

repetitive_email_workflows.description: QM manually collects KPI numbers from 6 department heads via email, consolidates into PowerPoint for management review pre-read.
Procurement sends individual reminder emails to suppliers with expired/expiring certificates. Tracked in personal Excel file.
Maintenance supervisor emails each equipment owner about upcoming calibrations, copying lab partner. No automation.
Customer service answers individual emails from account managers asking about complaint status.
QA assistant manually reminds approvers about documents pending signature for more than 7 days.
HR emails managers lists of team members with overdue mandatory training, compiled manually from LMS export.

document_mentions.note: Frequently attached as PDF v2.8 although current controlled version is 3.2 — stale copies circulating
Two versions (v4/v5) both in active circulation in email threads
Personal copy on supervisor's OneDrive referenced more often than controlled version
Competence matrix last referenced version dates from 2023

overdue_by_process.note: Audit findings without assigned closure evidence
High-risk treatment plans without progress update

stale_document_alerts.risk: Competence matrix does not reflect 3 new roles created in 2025
Warehouse instruction predates new WMS rollout (2025)
Change request form does not include new approval field required by policy
Supplier evaluation matrix missing cybersecurity criteria added to policy in 2025
Inspection instruction references discontinued measurement device

access_anomalies.detail: PDF export of WI-SAL-003 v2.8 stored in Sales shared folder, 17 downloads last 90 days
